scripts.clean-build: npm run clean-shared && npm run clean-backend
scripts.build: npm run clean-build && npm run build --prefix shared && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.package: npm install && npm run build && npm run clean-modules && npm install && npm run copy-builds
scripts.clean-symlinks: rm -f node_modules/@mau-arkiv/shared && rm -f node_modules/backend && rm -f node_modules/frontend
scripts.copy-builds: npm run clean-symlinks && cp -r shared/dist/ node_modules/@mau-arkiv/shared && cp -r backend/dist ./dist && cp -r node_modules ./dist/ && cp -r backend/config ./dist/
